testcase.name: Cost Profile Persistence Fix Verification › cost profile fields should be captured in form submission
testcase.system-out: ✓ Cost fields captured in form ✓ API request intercepted Payload: { "firstName": "E2E", "lastName": "Test", "businessName": "", "phone": "", "billingAddress1": "", "billingAddress2": "", "billingCity": "", "billingState": "", "billingZip": "", "defaultPickupAddress1": "", "defaultPickupAddress2": "", "defaultPickupCity": "", "defaultPickupState": "", "defaultPickupZip": "", "notifyEmail": true, "notifySms": false, "notifyInApp": true, "mcNumber": "", "dotNumber": "", "truckPaymentLease": 1800, "insurance": 900, "iftaIrpPermits": null, "phoneEldMisc": null, "perDiemDailyRate": null, "perDiemDaysPerMonth": null, "fuelCostPerGallon": 3.5, "milesPerGallon": 6.5, "maintenanceCostPerMile": null, "monthlyMilesTarget": null, "targetMarginPerMile": null } ✓ Cost fields present in API payload ✓ Profile save successful

testcase.name: Cost Profile Persistence Fix Verification › cost profile fields should persist to backend
Cost Profile Persistence Fix Verification › all cost profile fields should persist to backend
testcase.system-out: ✓ All cost fields persisted to backend
